name: Anubhab Das
bio: Motivated Computer Science undergraduate with strong fundamentals in programming, Generative AI development, and problem-solving. Seeking an entry-level software engineering or internship role to apply technical skills, gain industry experience, and contribute to real-world projects.
education: B.Tech in Computer Science from Elitte College of Engineering (MAKAUT), 2023–2026, CGPA: 7.0

experience.description: Built and deployed multiple Generative AI applications including RAG pipelines, LLM-powered agents, and AI-integrated portfolio tools.

projects.name: AI Workspace Pro (Final Year Project)
projects.description: Developed a backend-driven AI workspace using Python and FastAPI. Designed REST APIs and integrated database functionality. Improved understanding of scalable backend architecture and debugging.

projects.name: Expense Tracker with MCP Agent
projects.description: Built an agentic finance app using LangChain and Groq for natural language task execution. Implemented Model Context Protocol (MCP) to connect LLMs with modular external tools and servers. Orchestrated multi-step reasoning pipelines for automated tool execution and context-aware responses.

projects.name: Portfolio AI Agent
projects.description: A full-stack AI portfolio assistant that answers visitor questions using a LangGraph StateGraph agent, Pinecone semantic search, GitHub live data, and streaming SSE responses. Built with FastAPI backend and Next.js frontend.

projects.name: AI Blogger Agent
projects.description: An AI agent that autonomously researches topics and generates structured blog posts using multi-step reasoning and tool use.
